revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing misc last stuff

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}]]<noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]]</noinclude>[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Category:Pages with blank templates" to "Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove [[en:...]] and [[sn:...]] interwiki links
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Harvard citation/doc]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Harvard_citation%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Harvard_citation%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{documentation subpage}}{{tsh|harv}}
<!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata -->
{{high-use|6200}}
{{lua|Module:Footnotes}}

The '''harv''' ("Harvard citation") template creates a short citation in the form of "{{xt|(Smith 2007, p. 22)}}", for use inside [[WP:EXPLNOTESECT|explanatory notes]]. It is occasionally used in [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project namespace]] for [[Wikipedia:Essays|essays]]. It can be used within footnotes, but should not be used in the [[:en:Body text|Body text]] of any article. Since 2020, inline [[:en:Parenthetical referencing|parenthetical]] references have been [[Special:PermanentLink/976895063#Deprecate parenthetical citations|'''deprecated''' on Wikipedia]]. Any usage of parenthetical references in the body of an article can be converted to [[Help:Footnotes|footnotes]]. 

{{Harvard citation documentation|harv}}

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata -->
<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]][[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]
[[Category:11-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}]]<noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]]</noinclude>
</noinclude>
}}</includeonly>
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "1",
			"description": "1st author's last name",
			"example": "Smith",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true
		},
		"2": {
			"label": "2",
			"description": "2nd author's last name or year of publication",
			"example": "Williams or 2002",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true
		},
		"3": {
			"label": "3",
			"description": "3rd author's last name or year of publication",
			"example": "Jones or 2003",
			"type": "string"
		},
		"4": {
			"label": "4",
			"description": "4th author's last name or year of publication",
			"example": "Brown or 2004",
			"type": "string"
		},
		"5": {
			"label": "5",
			"description": "Year of publication",
			"type": "number",
			"example": "2005"
		},
		"ref": {
			"aliases": [
				"Ref"
			],
			"label": "Reference value",
			"description": "Usual not used. Reference value that links the short citation to the full citation. If you specify |ref=none, no hyperlink is created.",
			"example": "none"
		},
		"Ref": {},
		"loc": {
			"label": "Location",
			"description": "Some other description of the location. Can be a URL in [ ].",
			"example": "[https://archive.org/stream/merriamwebsterdi00merr#page/253]",
			"type": "url",
			"aliases": [
				"at"
			]
		},
		"p": {
			"description": "Single page number",
			"example": "374, xii, or A4",
			"type": "string",
			"suggested": true,
			"aliases": [
				"page"
			],
			"label": "Page"
		},
		"page": {},
		"pp": {
			"aliases": [
				"pages"
			],
			"deprecated": true,
			"label": "Pages",
			"description": "range of page numbers or multiple separate page numbers",
			"example": "124–27 or 42,47,A113",
			"type": "string"
		},
		"pages": {},
		"ps": {
			"label": "Quotes or additional comments",
			"description": "Used to add quotes or additional comments.",
			"example": "Table 7.1",
			"type": "string"
		}
	},
	"description": "This template creates a short author–date citation with a one-directional link to the first matching citation template on the same page.",
	"format": "inline"
}
</templatedata>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Harvard_citation%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{documentation subpage}}{{tsh|harv}}

{{high-use|6200}}
{{lua|Module:Footnotes}}

The '''harv''' ("Harvard citation") template creates a short citation in the form of "{{xt|(Smith 2007, p. 22)}}", for use inside [[WP:EXPLNOTESECT|explanatory notes]]. It is occasionally used in [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project namespace]] for [[Wikipedia:Essays|essays]]. It can be used within footnotes, but should not be used in the [[:en:Body text|Body text]] of any article. Since 2020, inline [[:en:Parenthetical referencing|parenthetical]] references have been [[Special:PermanentLink/976895063#Deprecate parenthetical citations|'''deprecated''' on Wikipedia]]. Any usage of parenthetical references in the body of an article can be converted to [[Help:Footnotes|footnotes]]. 

{{Harvard citation documentation|harv}}

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||

<noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]][[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:Blank templates]][[Category:refreshing s 1-26]]
[[Category:11-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}]]<noinclude>[[Category:Pages tagged as templates in userspace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]]</noinclude>
</noinclude>
}}</includeonly>
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "1",
			"description": "1st author's last name",
			"example": "Smith",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true
		},
		"2": {
			"label": "2",
			"description": "2nd author's last name or year of publication",
			"example": "Williams or 2002",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true
		},
		"3": {
			"label": "3",
			"description": "3rd author's last name or year of publication",
			"example": "Jones or 2003",
			"type": "string"
		},
		"4": {
			"label": "4",
			"description": "4th author's last name or year of publication",
			"example": "Brown or 2004",
			"type": "string"
		},
		"5": {
			"label": "5",
			"description": "Year of publication",
			"type": "number",
			"example": "2005"
		},
		"ref": {
			"aliases": [
				"Ref"
			],
			"label": "Reference value",
			"description": "Usual not used. Reference value that links the short citation to the full citation. If you specify |ref=none, no hyperlink is created.",
			"example": "none"
		},
		"Ref": {},
		"loc": {
			"label": "Location",
			"description": "Some other description of the location. Can be a URL in [ ].",
			"example": "[https://archive.org/stream/merriamwebsterdi00merr#page/253]",
			"type": "url",
			"aliases": [
				"at"
			]
		},
		"p": {
			"description": "Single page number",
			"example": "374, xii, or A4",
			"type": "string",
			"suggested": true,
			"aliases": [
				"page"
			],
			"label": "Page"
		},
		"page": {},
		"pp": {
			"aliases": [
				"pages"
			],
			"deprecated": true,
			"label": "Pages",
			"description": "range of page numbers or multiple separate page numbers",
			"example": "124–27 or 42,47,A113",
			"type": "string"
		},
		"pages": {},
		"ps": {
			"label": "Quotes or additional comments",
			"description": "Used to add quotes or additional comments.",
			"example": "Table 7.1",
			"type": "string"
		}
	},
	"description": "This template creates a short author–date citation with a one-directional link to the first matching citation template on the same page.",
	"format": "inline"
}
</templatedata>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
